summary: Transmits uncompressed video over ST 2110 IP networks for broadcast workflows (Blackmagic IP, Deltacast DELTA-ip-ST2110). Output channel and pixel format are controlled by the linked ST2110 Device CHOP.
common_gotchas: Resolution and frame rate must match the configured ST 2110 stream profile — mismatched values silently drop.
Like the input, requires PTP-synced network. Without it, downstream receivers will reject or jitter.
